function recordConsensus(uint256 roomId, uint16 weight) external
function getTraits(uint256 roomId) external view returns (tuple(uint16 intelligence, uint16 knowledge, uint8 wisdom, uint16 resonance, uint16 adaptability, uint16 coherence))
function getLineageDepth(uint256 roomId) external view returns (uint256)
event TraitsUpdated(uint256 indexed roomId, tuple(uint16 intelligence, uint16 knowledge, uint8 wisdom, uint16 resonance, uint16 adaptability, uint16 coherence) traits)
event WisdomClassified(uint256 indexed roomId, uint8 wisdom)
